item.title: An Introduction to the Economics of Immigration in OECD Countries
item.description: this article summarizes economics research on the effects of immigration in member countries of the OECD.

item.title: La politique optimale de séquestration du carbone par les sols agricoles en France
item.description: This paper analyzes the optimal path of carbon sequestration in French agricultural soils.

item.title: Quel mode de scrutin pour quel « vainqueur » ? Une expérience sur le vote préférentiel transférable
item.description: In this paper, we expose the results of a voting experiment realised in 2007, during the French Presidential election. This experiment aimed at confronting the Single Transferable Vote (SVT) procedure to two criteria : simplicity and the selection of a Condorcet-winner.

item.title: The optimal carbon sequestration in agricultural soils: Do the dynamics of the physical process matter?
item.description: This paper takes explicitly into account the temporality of sequestration. Its first contribution lies in the modelling of the asymmetry of the sequestration/de-sequestration process at a micro level, and of its consequences at a macro level.

item.title: L'immigration « choisie » face aux défis économiques du vieillissement démographique
item.description: In this paper, we show that replacement migration requires important flows whereas it implies only weak economic and financial effects.

item.title: L’immigration, quels effets économiques ?
item.description: In this contribution, we analyze the economic consequences of immigration into France.

item.title: Croissance endogène et pollution: Une approche fondée sur le comportement du consommateur
item.description: This paper develops a continuous time model of endogenous growth based on innovations in consumption goods.

item.title: Fiscalité environnementale et sensibilité écologique des consommateurs
item.description: This paper describes a dynamic applied general equilibrium model, with perfect foresight, designed for clarifying the questions concerning taxation and the environment.
